ogTitle: Seaton vs Seaview Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seaton and Seaview Downs.
heading: Seaton vs Seaview Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seaton, South Australia and Seaview Downs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seaview Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Seaton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seaton or Seaview Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seaton has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Seaview Downs scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seaton scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Seaview Downs scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seaton or Seaview Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seaview Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
